questions.text: Do you think studying online is just as effective as sitting in a real university classroom?
Why do some people find it difficult to stay motivated when studying by themselves at home?
how do computers and the internet make a student's life easier today?
Are there any negative effects of relying too much on technology for education?
Why do so many young people want to get a university degree these days?
Do you think a university degree is always necessary to get a good job, or are there other ways to succeed?
